items.label: Installation
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

## Install

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

or

```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"
```

```js
window.ZYNQ.games
```

items.label: Initialization
items.content:
## init(options?)

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({ search: "2048" })
```

Result (ZYNQ.games.list):
```js
[
  {
    name: "2048",
    alias: "2048",
    url: "g1/2048",
    thumb: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/2048.webp",
    category: "puzzle",
    devices: [1,2,3,4],
    isSupported: true,
    isFavorite: false
  },
  {
    name: "2048 Multitask",
    alias: "2048-multitask",
    url: "g1/2048-multitask",
    thumb: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/2048-multitask.webp",
    category: "puzzle",
    devices: [1,2],
    isSupported: true,
    isFavorite: false
  }
]
```

items.label: Game Model
items.content:
## Game Object

```js
{
  name: "Bloxorz",
  alias: "bloxorz",
  url: "g1/bloxorz",
  thumb: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
  category: "puzzle",
  devices: [1,2],
  isSupported: true,
  isFavorite: false
}
```

items.label: View
items.content:
## View

### list
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
```

```js
[
  {
    name: "Bloxorz",
    alias: "bloxorz",
    category: "puzzle"
  },
  {
    name: "BitLife",
    alias: "bitlife",
    category: "casual"
  }
]
```

### total
```js
ZYNQ.games.total
```

```js
40
```

### filteredCount
```js
ZYNQ.games.filteredCount
```

```js
2
```

items.label: Methods
items.content:
## Core

### search(query)
```js
ZYNQ.games.search("blox")
```

Result:
```js
[
  {
    name: "Bloxorz",
    alias: "bloxorz",
    url: "g1/bloxorz",
    thumb: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
    category: "puzzle",
    devices: [1,2],
    isSupported: true,
    isFavorite: false
  }
]
```

---

### getByAlias(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("bitlife")
```

Returns:
```js
{
  name: "BitLife",
  alias: "bitlife",
  url: "g1/bitlife",
  thumb: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bitlife.webp",
  category: "casual",
  devices: [1,2,3,4],
  isSupported: true,
  isFavorite: false
}
```

---

### getByCategory(category)
```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("puzzle")
```

Result:
```js
[
  {
    name: "2048",
    alias: "2048",
    category: "puzzle"
  },
  {
    name: "Bloxorz",
    alias: "bloxorz",
    category: "puzzle"
  }
]
```

---

### reset()
```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

Result:
```js
[/* all games restored */]
```

---

## Filtering

### filterSupported()
```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

Result:
```js
[
  {
    name: "2048",
    devices: [1,2,3,4],
    isSupported: true
  }
]
```

---

### filterFavorites()
```js
ZYNQ.games.filterFavorites()
```

Result (after favoriting bloxorz):
```js
[
  {
    name: "Bloxorz",
    alias: "bloxorz",
    isFavorite: true
  }
]
```

---

## Sorting

### sortBy(field)
```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

Result:
```js
[
  { name: "2048" },
  { name: "BitLife" },
  { name: "Bloxorz" }
]
```

---

### sortByPopularity()
```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

Result (if playCount exists):
```js
[
  { name: "BitLife", playCount: 5000 },
  { name: "2048", playCount: 3000 }
]
```

---

### shuffle()
```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

Result:
```js
[
  { name: "Bloxorz" },
  { name: "2048" },
  { name: "BitLife" }
]
```

---

## Random

### random(limit)
```js
ZYNQ.games.random(2)
```

Result:
```js
[
  {
    name: "BitLife",
    alias: "bitlife"
  },
  {
    name: "2048",
    alias: "2048"
  }
]
```

---

### getRandomOne()
```js
ZYNQ.games.getRandomOne()
```

Returns:
```js
{
  name: "Bloxorz",
  alias: "bloxorz",
  url: "g1/bloxorz",
  thumb: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
  category: "puzzle",
  devices: [1,2],
  isSupported: true,
  isFavorite: false
}
```

---

## Favorites

### toggleFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.toggleFavorite("bloxorz")
```

Effect:
```js
localStorage.ZYNQ_favs = ["bloxorz"]
```

Game now:
```js
{
  alias: "bloxorz",
  isFavorite: true
}
```

---

### isFavorite(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.isFavorite("bloxorz")
```

Returns:
```js
true
```

---

## History

### addToHistory(alias)
```js
ZYNQ.games.addToHistory("bitlife")
```

Effect:
```js
["bitlife", "bloxorz"]
```

---

### getHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.getHistory()
```

Returns:
```js
[
  {
    name: "BitLife",
    alias: "bitlife"
  },
  {
    name: "Bloxorz",
    alias: "bloxorz"
  }
]
```

---

### clearHistory()
```js
ZYNQ.games.clearHistory()
```

Result:
```js
[]
```
